mapper.sql: id, username, password, phone, email, avatar, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = false
